# ShopAI Slide Outline Template

Use this structure and adapt depth to the requested audience and time.

## Standard 10-12 Slide Deck
1. Title slide
   - Project name
   - Team or presenter name
   - One-line value proposition
2. Problem statement
   - Fragmented shopping workflow
   - Decision overload
   - Lack of integrated fit and sentiment support
3. Proposed solution
   - Unified AI shopping assistant
   - Core modules overview
4. Key features
   - Multi-platform search
   - Smart ranking
   - Sentiment analysis
   - 3D try-on
   - Fashion chatbot
5. System architecture
   - Client, server, service, data, external systems
6. Search and ranking pipeline
   - Scraping
   - Normalization and deduplication
   - Relevance filtering
   - Composite scoring
7. AI modules
   - Sentiment analysis
   - Chat workflow
   - Body estimation / try-on logic
8. Security and reliability
   - Auth
   - Validation
   - Rate limiting
   - Fallback paths
9. Demo flow or screenshots
   - Search to detail to try-on to chat
10. Current status and roadmap
   - Working modules
   - Gaps
   - Next steps
11. Impact / conclusion
   - Why the system matters
12. Q&A

## Optional Presenter Notes Pattern
- What this slide proves
- What to point at visually
- One transition sentence to the next slide

## Short Deck Compression
- Merge problem and solution.
- Merge features and architecture.
- Merge security and roadmap.

## Technical Deck Expansion
- Add dedicated slides for ranking formula, sentiment fallback chain, and deployment architecture.
